title: conversion of string '0   ' to type smallint or integer fails
bug_features_seed: INSERT INTO SMALLINT_TEST(f1) VALUES (CAST(TRIM('   42   ') AS SMALLINT));
INSERT INTO INTEGER_TEST(f1) VALUES (CAST(TRIM('   9999   ') AS INTEGER));
INSERT INTO INTEGER_TEST(f1) VALUES (CAST(TRIM('   -1   ') AS INTEGER));
key_bug_features: Inserting padded strings into smallint or integer fails
